chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4048 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.16565/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 7 3. For order on Misc. No.16566/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.16567/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 21.8.2025 Mr. Muhammad Arif advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioner has claimed that respondents No.2 to 7 are harassing the petitioner. Respondents No.2 to 7 are directed to ensure that they shall act strictly in accordance with law. A copy of this order shall be sent to the SHO Preedy Police Station, Karachi / respondent No.6, who shall ensure that no harassment shall takes place. A copy of this order shall also be sent to the SSP Karachi South, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
